name: Shamrock Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter; or margarine; or use All Crisco for shortening
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Mix all ingredients together, then add food coloring and mix well. Roll small balls of the dough (about 1/4 teaspoon), flatten with a fingertip into shamrock shapes, and attach stems. Sprinkle with green decorator sugar. Bake for about 9 minutes. If using self-rising flour, omit salt. Good Luck Cookies. Make Shamrock cookies by forming 4 small balls for each cookie shape, then arranging them into four-leaf clovers.
